news.title: Oil prices pull back on report U.S.-Iran agreement to extend ceasefire awaits Trump approval
news.summary: Oil prices pulled back Thursday, erasing earlier gains on a report that U.S. and Iranian negotiators reached an agreement to extend ceasefire.

news.title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
news.summary: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.

news.title: New York passes Mamdani's pied-a-terre tax. Here's who pays and how much
news.summary: Citadel CEO Ken Griffin became the face of the tax after New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani posted a video in front of Griffin's penthouse apartment.

news.title: Airlines, hotels warn against Trump admin threat to international flights to 'sanctuary cities'
news.summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Trump administration is considering pulling international flight processing in "sanctuary cities" Mullin: "We are looking at a number of different options"

news.summary: No description available. No description available for this model. For more information on this model, please visit: www.cruiseworld.com/cruisemodel.

news.title: Google engineer charged after making $1.2 million on Polymarket bets — showing insider trading is becoming everyone’s problem
news.summary: Prediction markets have an insider-trading problem. One-off cases might not solve it, as one-off case might not be enough.

news.title: Here’s the real story behind the record drop in America’s oil reserves
news.summary: Stocks in the nation’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve are near their lowest in more than 40 years. The U.S. has the world's largest reserves of oil and natural gas.

news.title: Mortgage rates inch up to 6.53% — the latest blow for sidelined spring buyers
news.summary: U.S. home-loan rates increased on Thursday but are still lower than a year ago. U.S.-based mortgage rates rose on Thursday, but remain lower than they were last year.

news.title: I’m setting up brokerage accounts for my grandkids in my daughter’s name. Is that wise — or am I asking for trouble?
news.summary: The contributions are invested in mutual funds tracking the S&P 500, small-cap stocks and international equities. “The contributions were made to a fund that invests in the U.S. stock market,” the company said.

news.title: SpaceX’s major AI compute deal with Anthropic could end a lot sooner than expected
news.summary: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk said his firm requested a “short term’ deal with Anthropic, despite touting plans that it could last for years.
